suggestions.title: getTeamVibe called 3+ times per render in App.jsx
suggestions.description: In App.jsx, getTeamVibe(activeWorkers) is called inline in the JSX at least 3 times: once for the vibe-pill, once for the StatsBar, and once for the greeting area. Each call re-filters and re-computes. Memoize this with useMemo or compute once at the top of the render and pass the result down.

suggestions.title: Office window sky uses viewer's local timezone, not team timezone
suggestions.description: WindowElement uses new Date().getHours() — the viewer's local time. A viewer in Tokyo sees Tokyo sky while the 'office' is in PST. This was flagged in review #12 and is still unfixed. Use a fixed timezone offset or Intl.DateTimeFormat with timeZone option.

suggestions.title: ROLE_EMOJIS in App.jsx and ROLE_COLORS + DEFAULT_ROSTER in Office.jsx should be in shared constants
suggestions.description: Role-related constants are scattered across files. Adding a new role requires editing multiple files. Extract to src/utils/constants.js. This was also flagged previously and remains unfixed.

suggestions.title: ActivityLog creates 2 new arrays every render
suggestions.description: [...entries].reverse().slice(0, 20) allocates two arrays per render. The parent also filters before passing entries. Memoize the reversed+sliced result with useMemo. Small win now, bigger win as activity log grows.

suggestions.title: No loading state for Office tab — just empty floor on first load
suggestions.description: Dashboard tab has LoadingSkeleton but Office tab shows an empty office floor during initial fetch. Add a subtle loading indicator or skeleton state for the office view to avoid the 'ghost office' moment.

suggestions.title: Tab state not synced with URL hash on browser back/forward
suggestions.description: Clicking tabs updates location.hash, but there's no hashchange/popstate listener. Browser back button doesn't switch tabs. Add a useEffect listening for hashchange events.

suggestions.title: No 'recently completed' section in dashboard
suggestions.description: Dashboard only shows active workers. Workers that finish just vanish (with a nice fade, granted). A small 'Recently Completed' collapsed section showing the last 3-5 done workers would give better context without cluttering the UI.

suggestions.title: Vibe whiteboard text could be more dynamic
suggestions.description: The whiteboard shows static text per vibe state. It would be more fun if it rotated through a few messages (like Bloberto's speech bubbles do). Maybe show the current sprint focus or a random motivational/sarcastic message.

suggestions.title: Activity filter buttons use aria-pressed but should use aria-selected with role=tab pattern
suggestions.description: The filter bar uses role='group' with aria-pressed on buttons, but it behaves like a tab/segmented control. Either switch to proper tab pattern or keep as toggle buttons — but the current mix is semantically ambiguous for screen readers.

suggestions.title: Office plants still lack variety — flagged in review #12
suggestions.description: All three plants use similar green palettes. Give the third plant a small flower or use a different pot color. Purely cosmetic but adds personality. This has been flagged multiple times now.

suggestions.title: Add subtle sound effects toggle for worker arrivals/departures
suggestions.description: A tiny optional 'ding' when a new worker appears or a 'door close' when one leaves would make the office feel alive. Default OFF, toggled via a small speaker icon. Fun factor boost.

suggestions.title: Ambient broadcast interval (45s) is hardcoded magic number
suggestions.description: The 45000ms interval in Office.jsx Character component should be a named constant at the top of the file for clarity and easy tuning.
